titleStmt.title: SII 34.63: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 63. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Rājarājakēsarivarman Rājarāja I, 29th year = A.D. 1014.

Gift of 15 kaḻañju of gold, by two madhyasthas of the village, for a lamp to the temple of Tirunallūr-Mahādēva at Kāmaravalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Miṟai-kūṟṟam in Rājēndrasimha-vaḷanāḍu on the north bank.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ pOlap perunilaic celviyum taṉakkE yurimai pūṇṭamai ma
ṉakkoḷak kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷiy vēṅkai nāṭum kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭi
taṭikaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamu meṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻa maṇṭalamu
m Ilaṭṭapāṭi Ēḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟittaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉneḻil vaḷaruḻiyuḷel
lāyāṇṭum toḻutakai viḷaṅkumiyāṇṭēy ceḻiyaraittēcukoḷ śrī kōvirājarāja kēcari panmarā
ṉa śrīrājarāja tēvarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 Āvatu vaṭakarai rājēntrasiṅha vaḷaṉāṭṭu miṟai
kkūṟṟattu prahmadeyam śrīkāmaravalli ccaturvvedi maṅkalattu tirunallūr mahādevarkku
Ivvūr madhyastaṉ cēntaṉ karuṇākaranum cēntaṉ śrī vāsudevanum Itdevarkku ca
ntirātittaval pakaluiravum Eriyavaiytta tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟu Itti
ru nontāviḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku Idevar paṇṭārattēy Idevar kaṉmikaḷ vaca Ivarka
ḷ vaiytta poṉ patiṉ kaḻañcu Ippoṉ patiṉkaḻañcukkum palicai cekuttu I
devar paṇṭārattEy nicatam Uḻakku Eṇṇaiyaṭṭi cantirātittaval Oru tirunon
tāviḷakku Erikkak kaṭavōmānōm devar kanmikaḷom Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 34.63 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
